expectations.text: the agent should read .agents/skills/ingesting-skills/SKILL.md before cloning anything, since the skill encodes the 9-step onboarding workflow
the agent should run preflight checks (does the source repo have a SKILL.md? does the marketplace already have an equivalent skill?) and report results before cloning
expectations.evidence: structure assertion without compare_args falls back to LLM judge

expectations.text: after the run, the new skill should exist in skills/<name>/SKILL.md with valid frontmatter and the manifest should list it
expectations.evidence: structure assertion without compare_args falls back to LLM judge

expectations.text: the agent should follow the documented 9-step workflow (preflight -> clone -> audit -> adapt -> integrate -> validate -> manifest update -> changelog -> commit) rather than ad-hoc copy-paste
expectations.evidence: The transcript only shows the agent loading writing-skills guidelines and asking for the URL, with no steps of the 9-step workflow performed.

expectations.text: the agent should produce a short onboarding doc/note describing what the skill does, why it was added, and how to invoke it — not just silently commit code
expectations.evidence: The transcript ends before any onboarding document is produced; no such output is present.
